hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q "supabase db reset"; then echo "{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"supabase db reset is forbidden. Use supabase migration up instead to apply migrations without wiping data.\"}"; else echo "{\"decision\": \"allow\"}"; fi'
[[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" != *.py ]] && exit 0; uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" && uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"
